question: What is the primary color of the fabric with the geometric pattern stitched on the left side? A. White B. Red C. Silver D. Orange
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A metallic silver sewing machine presser foot stitches layers of fabric together while the needle moves up and down rapidly through the material. The red fabric featuring a white geometric square pattern lies on the left side, guided by a hand with light skin tone. White fabric with small orange polka dots sits on the right side under the presser foot.

canonical_answer: At 0s, the sewing machine presser foot stitches red patterned fabric to white polka-dotted fabric; at 6s, the needle moves actively up and down through the layers; at 12s, a finger appears on the left side guiding the red fabric; at 18s, a hand holds the red fabric in place near the needle while stitching continues.
